calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Aug-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Paque appeared by zoom for Christi Fried.

Mr. Paque explained services provided and time spent to support the trustee's fee request. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant and adjust the trustee's fees.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: N. Ng. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Fiing Of The First Accounting
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Establish Minor'S Settlement Trust; To Set Bond; Allow For Interim Fees; And To Fix And Allow Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessica Jones appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court noted that no one was present to object, and stated that it waives notice of the second supplement which is actually an amendment to the proposed trust. Mrs. Jones has nothing to add. The Petition to Establish Minor's Settlement Trust, etc., is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition and approve the amended version of the trust. Status on filing of the first accounting for the period of now through February 29, 2024 is set for May 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting petition is to be filed two weeks prior.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.
